Civic Center  Way Improvements ¾ Updates:  The  contractor  continues  to  maintain  the  new  planting  material during the establishment  period per the contract documents. This period ends at the end  of August 2021.   Staff will be  closing out the project.

2021  Annual  Street Maintenance ¾ Project  Description:    This  project  provides  for  the  reconstruction  and maintenance  of  City  streets.  Including  asphalt  pavement  repairs,  Type  II slurry seal, speed  humps  and new  thermoplastic  striping.

PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  The project was approved by the Planning Commission on September 8, 2021. This project requires Caltrans approval since the work will be on  Pacific  Coast  Highway.  The  project  reports  and  plans  are  being routed through Caltrans for final approval.  The project will have final approval by the end of the March.  The project will be advertised for
